scripts.quality:format:check: npm run quality:code:format:check && npm run quality:terraform:format:check
scripts.quality:format:fix: npm run quality:code:format:fix && npm run quality:terraform:format:fix
scripts.quality:lint:check: npm --prefix midgard-sdk run lint && npm --prefix midgard-manager run lint && npm --prefix midgard-manager/packages/cli run lint && npm --prefix midgard-manager/packages/tx-generator run lint
scripts.quality:lint:fix: npm --prefix midgard-sdk run lint -- --fix && npm --prefix midgard-manager run lint:fix && npm --prefix midgard-manager/packages/cli run lint -- --fix && npm --prefix midgard-manager/packages/tx-generator run lint -- --fix
scripts.quality:type:check: npm --prefix midgard-node exec -- tsc --noEmit -p midgard-node/tsconfig.json --skipLibCheck --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 && npm --prefix midgard-sdk exec -- tsc --noEmit -p midgard-sdk/tsconfig.json --skipLibCheck --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 && npm --prefix midgard-manager/packages/cli exec -- tsc --noEmit -p midgard-manager/packages/cli/tsconfig.json --skipLibCheck --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 && npm --prefix midgard-manager/packages/tx-generator exec -- tsc --noEmit -p midgard-manager/packages/tx-generator/tsconfig.json --skipLibCheck --ignoreDeprecations 6.0 && npm --prefix midgard-ts exec -- tsc --noEmit -p midgard-ts/tsconfig.json --skipLibCheck --ignoreDeprecations 6.0
scripts.quality:check:all: npm run quality:format:check && npm run quality:lint:check && npm run quality:knip:check && npm run quality:type:check && npm run quality:osv:check
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:node:unit && npm run test:sdk:unit
